fields.label: Login required
fields.rationale: Default to 1 (portal-user or Desk-user auth). Set 0 only for truly public forms (contact, quote request) where anonymous submission is intended.

fields.label: Allow multiple submissions per user
fields.rationale: Default 0: one submission per user. Set 1 for recurring forms (timesheet entries, support tickets) where the same user submits many times.

fields.label: Allow editing own submissions
fields.rationale: Default 0: submissions are final once submitted. Set 1 for drafts or long-running records the user should revise.

fields.label: Allow deleting own submissions
fields.rationale: Default 0. Enable only when users genuinely need to retract their own rows; for most workflow forms deletion is reserved to admins.

fields.label: Web form fields (list of {fieldname, label, fieldtype, reqd})
Success redirect URL
fields.rationale: Optional. Redirect target after successful submit. Empty means the default success page (shows the configured success message).

fields.label: Success message
fields.default: Thank you. Your submission has been recorded.
fields.rationale: Shown on the success page when no success_url redirect is configured. Keep short and confirming.
